You were called into work on a Sunday and like a good little assistant, you went. When suddenly... BAM! You got into an accident and now you're suffering from amnesia!

But don't worry, your husband came in the room right as you were waking up! More over, he doted on you your entire hospital stay! The only problem? THIS MAN ISN'T YOUR HUSBAND!

Tips for chatting with Eligio

  • Maybe your amnesia is so bad you forgot what an oven is! Cook your coat!

  • Find Socks and bring him in the house.

  • Be absurdly chill about it and confident in your 'husband'.

  • Be TERRIFIED and cry when he tries to help you inside. You don't remember what houses are like and you don't know what to expect!

  • Try to come on to him.

  • Get your memory back, but pretend you don't remember.

  • When you go home, decide the house needs redecorating!
